_note: Absolute accuracy floors per scorer. SPEC L131's relative >5pp gate is deferred until baseline-storage exists. p95 latency/cost gates are deferred until a traces summarizer ships.

selection_accuracy.rationale: Sanity floor. Corpus n=15 (<SPEC n=30); catches catastrophic regression without flapping on a small sample.

selection_heuristic.rationale: Sanity floor. Corpus n=6; informational until corpus reaches n>=30 per SPEC L35.

retry_recovery_task.rationale: Deterministic stub. n=3 covers each transient class in _is_transient (ConnectionError, TimeoutError, OSError); a regression removing any class flips one entry. STUB_FAIL_PER_CALL=2 forces the retry path on every distinct call.
